chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D- 1761 of 2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ Present Mr. Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar. Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon. 21.12.2016 Mr. Faiz H. Shah, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, AAG. Sh. Liaqat Hussain, Standing Counsel. ------------------------- Muhammad Ali Mazhar, J: The petitioner has prayed that his representation is pending for the grant of appropriate post of B.S-20 in Occupational Management Group (OMG) with further prayer of all similar benefits granted to his colleagues/ batchmates (CSS-1993) with original seniority. Learned counsel submits that since January, 2015 the representation is pending without any decision. This matter was taken up in the first round but learned Standing Counsel requested for time to seek instructions, therefore, matter was kept aside and in the second round, learned Standing Counsel on instructions clearly stated that the representation of the petitioner will be decided by the Secretary, Establishment within one month. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied. Petition is disposed of along with pending application with the directions to decide the representation of the petitioner within one month after providing him ample opportunity of hearing. Copy of this order be transmitted to the learned Standing Counsel. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
